extension.description: Orion v3.5.1 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface. BIGGER thumbnails throughout. Netflix-style season selector and episode grid with BIG thumbnails (364x205px). NEW: Episode progress bars, "Continue Watching" badges, watched checkmarks. Multiple torrent scrapers, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration.
extension.news: [3.5.1] NEW: Episode progress bars showing watched percentage! "CONTINUE" badge on partially watched episodes. Green checkmark on fully watched episodes. [3.5.0] Much BIGGER thumbnails. Netflix-style Season Selector and Episode Grid dialogs.
